query: SELECT p.capexGrade, p.priority, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM collateralProjectMatches cpm JOIN projects p ON cpm.projectId = p.id JOIN collateralItems ci ON cpm.collateralId = ci.id WHERE ci.name LIKE '%XAVS1800%' GROUP BY p.capexGrade, p.priority ORDER BY p.capexGrade, p.priority
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT p.capexGrade, p.priority, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM collateralProjectMatches cpm JOIN projects p ON cpm.projectId = p.id JOIN collateralItems ci ON cpm.collateralId = ci.id WHERE ci.name LIKE '%XAVS1800%' GROUP BY p.capexGrade, p.priority ORDER BY p.capexGrade, p.priority
